test.name: TC_001_VQ_ANALYSIS

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Video Metrics
kw.msg:
<class 'str'>
<class 'str'>
Video Quality Metrics: {'Resolution': '640 x 480', 'FPS': 30.0, 'Black Frames': 0, 'Avg PSNR': 24.06, 'Blocking Rate': 56.24, 'Banding Rate': 34.15, 'Blur Frames': 0, 'Clarity Score': 88.65, 'Quality_Score': 23.76, 'Dropped Frames': 0, 'SSIM Score': 0.73, 'Macroblocking': 'Macroblocking Detected', 'Blur Score': 681.1, 'Codec': 'BGR3', 'Timestamp': '0910_142427'}

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: EVALUATE VIDEO QUALITY STATUS
Convert To Number
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a floating point number.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Fail
kw.msg: Video quality is BAD — Test Failed
kw.arg: Video quality is BAD — Test Failed
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Video quality is BAD — Test Failed

kw.arg: Video quality is BAD — Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.
kw.status: Video quality is BAD — Test Failed
Video quality is BAD — Test Failed

test.status: Video quality is BAD — Test Failed
